projects.title: Film Tracker
projects.summary: Movie collection tracker powered by Google Sheets and TMDB.
projects.description: A simple website for tracking what films I have collected and what I have yet to collect. It pulls its data from a Google Sheet making use of the Sheets API. It also pulls information from The Movie Database (TMDB) in order to display a movie's poster, tags, runtime and release year. It also has searching functionality as well as options for changing the display order of the movies.
